body.title: Inference proxy: Rules engine (task class → model routing)
body.result: Built in 715eca0a — sources/models/rules/health all in devices/inference/, 14 tests passing
body.description:
Priority-ordered routing rules: given a request with caller_id and task_class (minion/worker/analyst/designer), select Source + Model. Rules checked in order, first match wins. Initial rules: minion→qwen3.5-9b/OR, worker→deepseek-v4-flash/OR, analyst→qwen3.6-35b-a3b/OR, designer→claude-haiku/Anthropic. Health-aware: skip unavailable sources. Session-affinity: same session_id stays on same model.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/rules_engine.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: rule matching, health-aware selection, session affinity. Out of scope: graph tree rules (phase 2), UI.
**Completion criteria:** minion task routes to Qwen, designer task routes to Claude. Unavailable source skipped automatically.
